integrity.description: The agent actually used the CAMEO Chemicals website to find the information.
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that the agent navigated the CAMEO Chemicals website in a browser rather than hallucinating the data or using a general search engine without opening the NOAA site.

integrity.description: The agent created and saved a real text file on the Desktop.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that a file named 'field_id_reference.txt' was actually created and saved using a text editor or terminal command, rather than just printing the output to the terminal without saving.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a pre-written script to bypass manual or standard data collection.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the agent manually searched for the chemicals and compiled the document, rather than executing a single pre-existing script to fetch and format the data.

privileged_info_for_vlm:
Verified physical properties (minor rounding differences are acceptable):
- Bromine: Liquid, dark reddish-brown, pungent odor, BP: 139.2°F / 59.6°C, MP: 19°F / -7.2°C.
- Potassium permanganate: Solid/crystalline, purple/dark purple, odorless, BP: decomposes (data unavailable), MP: ~464°F / 240°C.
- Hydrazine: Liquid, colorless, ammonia-like odor, BP: 236.3°F / 113.5°C, MP: 36°F / 2.2°C.
- Carbon disulfide: Liquid, colorless to light yellow, strong disagreeable odor, BP: 116°F / 46.5°C, MP: -167°F / -111.5°C.
- Titanium tetrachloride: Liquid, colorless, pungent odor, BP: 277.5°F / 136.4°C, MP: -11.4°F / -24.1°C.
